questions.question: Which of the following forests are predominantly found in areas receiving annual rainfall between 100 cm and 200 cm in India?
Which of the following regions in India is known for the Shola forests?
In India, irrigation projects with a Cultivable Command Area (CCA) of more than 10,000 hectares are classified as:
In India, which region is NOT suitable for tube-well irrigation due to non-alluvial tracts?
In India, judicial review is considered as:
questions.option_1: the power of the judiciary to pronounce upon the constitutionality of laws and executive orders
questions.option_2: the power of the judiciary to question the wisdom of the laws enacted by the legislatures
questions.option_3: the power of the judiciary to review all the legislative enactments before they are assented to by the President
questions.option_4: the power of the judiciary to question the wisdom of the executive orders after they are passed by the Union cabinet

questions.question: In India, which sector is responsible for transforming natural products into manufactured goods?
The easternmost extension of the Himalayas does NOT include which of the following?
How are the Himalayan ranges oriented in Arunachal Pradesh?
Which Himalayan range is the northern-most and contains the loftiest peaks?
Which physiographic feature lies parallel to the Shiwaliks and is about 8-16 km wide?
Which Indian state had the highest Human Development Index (HDI) in 2017?
According to the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (UNCLOS), India’s Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ) extends upto __________.
'Swaraj Dweep', a popular tourist destination known for its beaches, is located in:
According to the 2011 Census, which island in Lakshadweep has the smallest population?
If it is 12 noon at IST (82°30′E), what time is it approximately at 97°30′E longitude?
Which of the following options best explains the temporary cessation of rainfall during the southwest monsoon over parts of India?
Which Indian city is most influenced by retreating monsoon rainfall?
Which Indian state receives rainfall from both, the Southwest and Northeast monsoons?
Which of the following mountain passes is located in the Pir Panjal range?
Which of the following mountain ranges contains the 'Valley of Flowers' National Park?
Where is Rohtang Pass located?
questions.option_1: On the Zanskar range, near Kargil
questions.option_2: On the eastern Pir Panjal range, near Manali
questions.option_3: On the Dhauladhar range, near Dharamshala
questions.option_4: On the Shiwalik hills, near Dehradun

questions.question: As of April 2025, Similipal - designated as the second national park of the state - is located in:
Which of the following national parks is recognised as the world's only floating national park?
questions.option_1: Gulf of Mannar Marine National Park

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a physiographic subdivision of the Northern Plains of India?
Which region is NOT part of the outer boundary of the Peninsular Plateau?
